name: iwac-mcp-server
description: Read-only access to the Islam West Africa Collection via Hugging Face datasets.
long_description:
Search and analyse the Islam West Africa Collection (IWAC): ~12,000 newspaper articles, 1,500 Islamic publications, 4,700 index entries, plus audiovisual materials, documents, and academic references. Includes AI sentiment analysis (Gemini polarity/centrality).

**No API key is required for the 16 core tools** (keyword search, filtering, statistics, item details). Two optional semantic-search tools use Gemini embeddings and need a free Google/Gemini API key; these are disabled by default.

On first use the server downloads ~250 MB of parquet data from Hugging Face into a local cache.

tools.name: search_articles
tools.description: Search newspaper articles by keyword, country, newspaper, subject, and date range.

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Get full metadata and OCR text for a specific article.

tools.name: semantic_search_articles
tools.description: Optional. Semantic similarity search over article OCR. Disabled by default — requires a free Google/Gemini API key.

tools.name: semantic_search_publications
tools.description: Optional. Semantic similarity search over publication tables of contents. Disabled by default — requires a free Google/Gemini API key.

tools.name: search_by_sentiment
tools.description: Filter articles by Gemini polarity and centrality labels.

tools.name: get_sentiment_distribution
tools.description: Aggregate Gemini sentiment stats across a filter set.

tools.name: search_index
tools.description: Search the authority index (persons, places, organisations, subjects).

tools.name: get_index_entry
tools.description: Get full details of an index entry.

tools.name: list_subjects
tools.description: List subject terms ranked by frequency.

tools.name: list_locations
tools.description: List locations from the index, optionally filtered by country.

tools.name: list_persons
tools.description: List persons from the index, optionally filtered by country.

tools.name: get_collection_stats
tools.description: Overall stats for all six IWAC subsets.

tools.name: get_newspaper_stats
tools.description: Per-newspaper article counts and date ranges.

tools.name: get_country_comparison
tools.description: Compare article counts and sentiment across countries.

tools.name: search_publications
tools.description: Search Islamic publications (books, periodicals) including their tables of contents.

tools.name: get_publication_fulltext
tools.description: Retrieve full OCR text of a publication, optionally with keyword excerpts.

tools.name: search_references
tools.description: Search academic references (journal articles, books, theses).

cache_dir.title: Dataset cache directory
cache_dir.description: Where to store the downloaded IWAC parquet files (~250 MB on first run). Leave default to use your home directory.

semantic_search_enabled.title: Enable semantic search (optional)
semantic_search_enabled.description: Most users can leave this off. Enables two extra tools that find articles/publications by meaning rather than keywords. Requires a free Google/Gemini API key and uses network calls at query time. The other 16 tools work without this.

google_api_key.title: Google / Gemini API key
google_api_key.description: Required only if semantic search is enabled. Get a free key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey.

embedding_model.title: Gemini embedding model
embedding_model.description: Model used to encode semantic-search queries. Must match the embeddings stored in the dataset.
